content.en:
Several Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors of the Immortal Island Alliance were also terrified, so they wanted to apologize to Wind Tooth Island.

Wind Tooth Island will also care about face, after the Immortal Island Alliance is so low-voiced, Wind Tooth Island will not deal with them anymore.

That way, they can survive.

Compared to life, what is a mere face?

Soon.

The three Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors of the Immortal Island Alliance took the Lord of Hao Prison and some other Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestors to Wind Tooth Island.

......

Wind Tooth Island.

Ever since Wind Tooth Island announced the birth of an Origin Upper Realm Overlord, many forces have come to congratulate them.

Although Wind Tooth Island is not yet qualified to be ranked as a hegemon-level power, it is not comparable to ordinary top forces.

At this point, Wind Tooth Island specially set aside an island to entertain the Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors of all forces.

Gradually, there were many Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors gathered on Wind Tooth Island.

The Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor of the Immortal Island Alliance came, and the Lord of the Wind Fang naturally did not stop them and let them in.

Subsequently.

The Immortal Island Alliance took out a lot of treasure resources and personally apologized to the Lord of the Wind Fang, which made the Lord of the Wind Fang very proud.

Of course.

It's not just the Immortal Island Alliance, but also some forces that have clashed with Fengya Island have come to apologize, and they have taken out a lot of resources to congratulate Fengya Island.

It can be said that this time, Fengya Island has earned a lot of resources just by receiving gifts.

Soon.

Ye Tian came forward and met with the representatives of these forces, and also showed the aura of the overlord of the Origin Upper Realm.

After a while.

The representatives of these forces left one by one, and Ye Tian's fame spread throughout the central part.

Central.

Ancient Heavenly Palace.

The Desolate Blood Ancestor took the time to come back and was a little surprised to learn that the Endless Lord had become the Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor.

"Endless Lord, that little guy, he has become the Origin Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor???"

He remembered that Ye Tian had only been away from the Ruins of Reincarnation Void Treasure Land for a short time, and he had become the Overlord of the Origin Upper Realm so quickly???

At this time, he remembered the situation in the Void Treasure Land, it was said that the Heavenly Ancestor of the Origin Upper Realm sensed the breath of the Overlord of the Origin Upper Realm, could it be Ye Tian?

"No, even if he was really an Origin Upper Realm Overlord, he would have been killed a long time ago, and besides, when he came out, he was still at the peak of the Origin Upper Realm, and he had not reached the Origin Upper Realm Overlord level!" the Desolate Blood Ancestor shook his head and dispelled this speculation.

Immediately, he smiled again.

No matter what secrets the Endless Lord has, how to break through and succeed, there is no point in dwelling on it.

The Lord of Endless has already broken through, that is, an existence of the same level as him, there is no need to offend.

In the blink of an eye.

Another period of time has passed, and the news that Ye Tian has become the overlord of the Origin Upper Realm has not been discussed by many people, after all, almost everyone knows it, and the Origin Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor who does not know is itself weak and unqualified to know.

this day.

When Ye Tian was cultivating and comprehending the rules of the Origin on the other side of Fengya Island, a Heavenly Ancestor of the Origin Upper Realm came to visit Ye Tian.

This Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor is the Lord of the Cold Stars.

"Lord of the Cold Star, you came to me to trade the cold gold on the other side?" Ye Tian asked.

"Lord of Endless, I'm not here to trade the cold gold on the other side, it's an Origin Upper Realm Overlord of our Town Heaven Realm City, Lord Yan Zu, I'm here to send you an invitation to participate in a Origin Upper Realm Overlord Meeting. "Lord of the Cold Stars.

"Oh, the Origin Upper Realm Overlord Council!"

Ye Tian accepted the invitation and immediately said, "Okay, I know, I'll go when the time comes!"

Immediately.

The Lord of the Cold Stars retreated with a fist.

After leaving Stormtooth Island.

The Lord of the Cold Star was full of envy: "I thought that at the beginning, the Lord of Endless was not as good as me, but I didn't expect that in a short period of time, he had surpassed me and become the overlord of the Origin Upper Realm!"

However, he also had the hope of becoming the Overlord of the Origin Upper Realm, as long as he successfully cultivated the Origin Ancestral Body Method on the other side.

......

"Xianyun Mountain!"

Ye Tian took a look at the invitation, the meeting place was Xianyun Mountain, and the time was six primeval eras, which was not long.

He didn't know a few Origin Upper Realm Overlords yet, but this was an opportunity.

He didn't know much about the path after the Origin Upper Realm Overlord, maybe he could know something from them this time.

He didn't think that now was the limit of his cultivation, the king of the abyss beasts in the middle of the sea abyss, and the mysterious existence in the dark and void mist of the ruins of reincarnation, were all extremely terrifying existences, and they could kill him in an instant.

This kind of existence is not something he can match now, and it is not an exaggeration to say that it has surpassed the level of the overlord of the Origin Upper Realm!

Soon.

Six primeval epochs have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian went to Xianyun Mountain.

At his current speed, it didn't take long for him to rush to Xianyun Mountain.

Xianyun Mountain is not a treasure land, it's just that the Origin Upper Realm Overlords chose the meeting location here, that's all.

Xianyun Mountain has an ancient city at this moment.

A Origin Upper Realm Overlord descended here, and after Ye Tian came, he sensed many Origin Upper Realm Overlords.

He originally thought that there were very few Origin Upper Realm Overlords in the Land of Eternity, but now he was underestimating!

Like the nine top overlord forces in the central region, no one knows exactly how many Origin Upper Realm overlords there are.

Some of the Origin Upper Realm Overlords have existed so old that countless powerhouses have even forgotten them, or some Origin Upper Realm Overlords have broken through and will not say it to the outside world.

As a result, the outside world does not have a concept of the top hegemonic forces.

In fact, the number of Origin Upper Realm Overlords among these top overlord forces is definitely more than ten, and the total is about a hundred!

Moreover, many top forces will also have a Origin Upper Realm Overlord, but the power is too weak to be called a hegemonic force.

It can be said that in the entire land of eternity, there is no problem with more than two hundred Origin Upper Realm Overlords.

There are also some special places, such as the ruins of the Shadows, which also definitely have the Overlord of the Origin Upper Realm, but they will not come here to attend the meeting.

This time the meeting will be confined to the land beyond eternity.

"Infinity Lord!"

A woman appeared in front of Ye Tian.

"Hello, Yanzu!"

Ye Tian recognized the identity of this woman at a glance by copying her talent, she was the Origin Upper Realm Overlord Yan Ancestor of Zhentian Realm City, and she was also the one who invited him to the meeting.

"Lord of Infinity, there's still a little time until the meeting, let's talk?"

Yan Zu smiled.

"Okay!"

Ye Tian nodded slightly, and immediately followed Yan Zu to an attic somewhere in the city.

Immediately, they blocked the time and space and chatted quietly.
